title: AACA Glossary
description: JSON Schema for GLOSSARY.yaml — defines ubiquitous language terms used throughout the system.

terms.description: Map of term names to their definitions and metadata.

not_to_be_confused_with.description: Clarification to distinguish from similar or commonly confused terms.

code_representation.description: How this term appears in code (e.g. class name, variable, type).

lifecycle.description: Description of the term's lifecycle or state transitions.

constraints.description: Business rules or invariants that apply to this term.

owned_by.description: Module or team that owns this concept.
